---
title: "Reference"
subtitle: "Use these pages when you get stuck"
date: last-modified
---

![](images/icons/icon_15.png){.chapter-icon fig-alt="Chapter icon"}

This is the guide's reference section. These pages are **not** meant to be read in order — you jump here when you have a specific question in the middle of an analysis.

::: {.nowrap-first-col}

| Page | Use it when you want to... |
|---|---|
| [Functions: overview](15a_guide_til_funktioner.qmd) | look up a single function — what does `filter()`, `collect()`, `%>%`, `left_join()` do? Each function explained from scratch. |
| [Format tables](15b_formateringstabeller.qmd) | translate codes to text (municipality numbers, education and employment codes) with DST's SAS format files. |
| [DST pitfalls](15c_dst_faldgruber.qmd) | check the 10 errors that most often cost time and produce uninformative error messages. |
| [Register reference](15d_register_reference.qmd) | find the confirmed column names, types and join keys for each register. |

:::

::: {.callout-tip}
Know the function or register name? Open the relevant page and use **Ctrl+F** (Windows) / **Cmd+F** (Mac) to search directly.
:::

---

Finished with the analysis and ready to send results home?

→ [Phase 16 — Export and repatriation](16_eksport-hjemsendelse.qmd)
